description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 56,925; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION The tip of this dark wooden shaft holds a piece of hard, chalk-like stone between black, clawlike protrusions. The staff allows use of the following spells: Alarm (1 charge) Magic mouth (1 charge) Phantom trap (1 charge) Explosive runes (2 charges) Fire trap (2 charges) Sepia snake sigil (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells alarm, explosive runes, fire trap, magic mouth, phantomn trap, sepia snake sigil; Cost 36,525 gp.
